title: Possibility to ungroup tasks on the main view
excerpt: Would be great to have a better view of all tasks on the board. Today there are so many blank space between the groups it’s terrible to have a look at all the tasks. So, if it was possible to group tasks by any of the co…

posts.author: Tai_Freitas (Tainá)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to have a better view of all tasks on the board. Today there are so many blank space between the groups it’s terrible to have a look at all the tasks. So, if it was possible to group tasks by any of the columns other than group would be awesome. Like Click Up already does.
